subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! Faramarz the valiant was renowned throughout realm and territory, and upon the chessboard of the world did move as both vizier and queen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق فرامرز دلیر شهیر بوم و مرز بود و در شطرنج جهان وزیر و فرز ولی
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
